description: Breadcrumb navigation trail with customizable separator, icon support, and optional click callback. Items render as links or buttons depending on configuration.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: Breadcrumb items to render. Accepts any IBreadcrumbItem implementation.

parameters.name: Separator
parameters.description: Separator character between items. Defaults to "/".

parameters.name: OnItemClick
parameters.description: Optional callback when a breadcrumb item is clicked. When set, renders items as buttons instead of links.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.
